articles.title: Karnataka Minister Priyank Kharge accuses BJP of formulating LPG cylinder crisis in India
articles.excerpt: Karnataka Minister Priyank Kharge alleged the BJP created the LPG cylinder shortage. He questioned Prime Minister Narendra Modi's foreign policy decisions. Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman countered, criticizing the opposition's protests. She stated the go…

articles.title: Rajasthan govt plans elevated traffic corridor along Dravyavati river to ease congestion
articles.excerpt: Jaipur is set to get an elevated traffic corridor along the Dravyavati river. The Jaipur Development Authority has approved a detailed project report for this. The plan aims to reduce traffic pressure and improve city infrastructure. Funds have also been allo…
